title: Glowing Golden Apples
description: Gives the enchanted golden apple a distinct texture, making it stand out more when compared to its regular counterpart.
body:
This texture pack gives a new sprite to enchanted golden apples, making them more distinct from their regular counterparts.

**Pack Modifier**
This pack includes a modifier that you can add to [Tasty Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tasty-items), letting you use the glowing apple texture from this resource pack alongside the eating animations of Tasty Items.  

- the zip file can just be dragged and dropped in your "resourcepacks" folder, unzipping isn't required;
- Optifine isn't required to use this pack.
